prevalence.source: SBED - Sociedade Brasileira para Estudo da Dor
prevalence.trend: increasing due to greater awareness and diagnostic improvements

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ACR 2016 criteria, widespread pain index + symptom severity scale, SBED/SBR guidelines

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: 35% adequately managed due to access barriers

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ACR 2016 criteria adapted by SBED/SBR, clinical diagnosis, exclusion of other conditions
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Multimodal: amitriptyline, duloxetine, pregabalin via SUS; Physical therapy, cognitive-behavioral therapy, exercise programs
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Underdiagnosis and misdiagnosis, limited multidisciplinary pain clinics, stigma, psychiatric comorbidities
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: SBED/SBR guidelines, medications available via SUS, growing awareness, pain management programs
